title: Generating SQL Indexes for Performance
scenario: Generate a SQL script to create indexes on a table for improved query performance. The table name is 'orders' and the columns to be indexed are 'customer_id' and 'order_date'. The script should handle the creation of primary and non-clustered indexes.
constraints: Must use the CREATE INDEX statement to create the indexes
Must specify the type of index (PRIMARY KEY or NON-CLUSTERED)
Must handle the creation of indexes on multiple columns

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated SQL syntax is valid and follows the standard SQL syntax rules.
Verify if the generated SQL script correctly creates primary and non-clustered indexes on the specified columns.
Evaluate how accurately the generated SQL script specifies the type of index (PRIMARY KEY or NON-CLUSTERED) for each column.
